title: Fix staging-only TopicMemoryVectorStore resource name collision
description: Create a dev-based fix branch and patch TopicMemoryVectorStore naming logic so only staging avoids resource-existence collisions while leaving non-staging behavior unchanged.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Started work: creating a new fix branch from dev and implementing a staging-only naming disambiguation in TopicMemoryVectorStoreStack to avoid EarlyValidation ResourceExistenceCheck collisions without changing non-staging resource names.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Implemented staging-only fix on branch fix/staging-topic-memory-vectorstore-collision: TopicMemoryVectorStoreStack now appends account-id suffix to vector bucket/index/embeddings bucket names only when environmentName is staging. Non-staging names are unchanged. Validation passed: npx tsc -p amplify/tsconfig.json --noEmit --pretty false.
